'''Eelen Li''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Triffian/Legends|Triffian]] who served as a representative of the Triffians of her [[Triffis/Legends|homeworld]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] at some point during [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] tenure as [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

Upon learning of Palpatine's love of antiquities, Senator Li gave him a near-prehistoric [[Unidentified Triffian carving|stone carving]] of a Triffian, from [[Unidentified Triffian museum|one]] of her homeworld's museums. Palpatine kept it on display in his [[Palpatine's apartment/Legends|apartments]] in [[500 Republica/Legends|500 Republica]].
